summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Finance Dashboard with RBAC. All major features working correctly including role-based access control, filtering, sorting, charts, export functionality, and responsive design. Found one minor category filter issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Category filter for 'Food' returns 30 results instead of only Food transactions
ui_bugs.details: When filtering by Food category, it shows all 30 user transactions instead of filtering to only Food category transactions

passed_tests: RBAC functionality - Admin sees 60 transactions, User sees 30 transactions
Role switcher dropdown - Successfully switches between Admin and User roles
Dark mode toggle - Switches themes and persists in localStorage
Transaction search - Search for 'Grocery' returned 5 results
Date range filtering - This Month filter returned 10 results
Transaction sorting - Date, category, and amount sorting all working
Insights cards - All 3 cards present and updating based on role
Charts functionality - Monthly trends bar chart and category breakdown pie chart working
Export functionality - CSV and JSON export downloads triggered successfully
Empty state handling - Shows correctly with clear filters button
LocalStorage persistence - Theme persists after page reload
Responsive design - Works on desktop (1920px), tablet (768px), and mobile (390px)
Framer Motion animations - 37 elements with animation styles detected
Combined filters - Coffee + Food search returned 3 results
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix category filter logic in TransactionTable component - currently Food category filter shows all user transactions instead of filtering to only Food category transactions
